summary: Iteration 4 (password rules + referral rewards + expanded scan/lookup coupon fields + restructured coupon result card) fully validated. Backend pytest: 10/10 passing. Frontend Playwright: signup checklist (data-testid signup-password-checklist, pw-check-length, pw-check-upper, pw-check-special) toggles correctly, submit button disabled with 'abc' & amber border, enabled with 'Test@1234' & emerald border, invalid referral 'BADCODE99' surfaces backend error. /scan manual mode renders new coupon result card with Verified SavyCampusDeals member hero badge, student name+college+course/year/ID/pass-valid-till, secondary coupon summary (brand+discount+code) and Approve & mark as redeemed CTA.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py now ~1450 lines — well past the 700-line split threshold. Split into routers: auth, offers, outlets, coupons, scan, verification.

Referral system has no self-referral guard: if a user knew a valid code and manipulated the client to send their OWN referral_code before registration, the code check would still pass since they don't exist yet. Low risk but worth an explicit check that referrer._id != new user (trivially true today) — leaves open referral farming with disposable emails though (no anti-abuse cap).
No cap on referral bonuses per referrer — a single referral_code could be spammed across N throwaway signups to farm points.

validate_password + Pydantic min_length=8 duplicate the length check; consider dropping min_length in favour of the richer HTTPException 400 with a clear message (current: len=3 -> 422 pydantic, len=8 no upper -> 400 friendly).
PASSWORD_RE constant is defined but never used; validate_password re-implements the checks. Dead code — remove.
OTP still lacks brute-force protection (carried over from iter 3).
Referrer bonus email is sent synchronously inside register() — will delay the response if Resend is slow or times out; move to a background task.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (signup checklist + referral error + scan coupon result card all pass)

test_credentials: Admin: admin@savycampusdeals.in / Admin@123. Test students created dynamically with password 'Test@1234'. OTP via dev_otp field on /register response OR mongo: db.getSiblingDB('savycampusdeals').otp_codes.findOne({email:'..',used:false}).otp
seed_data_creation: No manual seeding required — startup handles 14 brand offers + 6 outlets. Tests use TEST_iter4_ prefix.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 4 passes cleanly end-to-end. Referrer_email lookup in mongo is stored lowercase — use .lower() when querying db.referrals. All new expanded scan/lookup coupon fields (student_college, student_course, student_year, student_avatar_url, student_email, student_expiry, student_expiry_expired) verified. Signup submit button uses disabled attribute based on client-side pwValid, so tests should Fill password before clicking submit.
